June 15, 2026
Mr. Somerset Elcid Siang Chief Executive Officer
Advanced Infinit Technology Solutions Inc.
Unit 304 La Cima, McArthur Highway Matina, Davao City
RE: Application for Web Development Internship (162 Hours OJT)
Dear Mr. Siang,

I am Jomarie T. Travilla, a 3rd-year Bachelor of Science in Computer Science student at the University of Mindanao, and I am writing to express my sincere interest in completing my required 162-hour On-the-Job Training at Advanced Infinit Technology Solutions Inc. as a Web Development Intern. I am available to begin as early as the last week of June or the first week of July 2026, and I am eager to contribute to your team while growing under the guidance of experienced technology professionals.

My technical background covers both front-end and back-end web development. I am proficient in Laravel, PHP, React, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, and MySQL, and I work with Git and GitHub for version control. Most significantly, I served as the lead developer — responsible for 90% of the system — for CoolMasterSpecialist, a fully deployed, production-grade service management web application built for a real business. The system integrates 7 subsystems including online bookings, point-of-sale, inventory management, customer records, technician scheduling, business analytics, and PDF report generation. This experience taught me how to architect, build, and deliver real software under real conditions — not just academic exercises.

I am drawn to Advanced Infinit Technology Solutions because of its commitment to delivering innovative and forward-thinking technology solutions to businesses. I believe my hands-on development experience, combined with my dedication to writing clean and functional code, will allow me to contribute meaningfully to your projects from day one. I am a fast learner, a self-starter, and I bring genuine passion for web development to every task I take on.

I would be honored to discuss how I can be of value to your team. I have attached my resume for your review. Please feel free to reach me at 09482414092 or jomtravilla.dev@gmail.com. I am available for an interview at your most convenient time and look forward to the opportunity to contribute to Advanced Infinit Technology Solutions Inc.

Respectfully yours,
JOMARIE T. TRAVILLA
BS Computer Science — 3rd Year, University of Mindanao
